title: 21 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including One Dividend King
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 9.6% and a median increase of 6.25%. I've tracked 118 increases in 2022. There are twenty-one increases for next week, up from eighteen last week.

title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Vulcan Materials' (VMC) fourth-quarter results reflect strong demand and a positive pricing environment amid inflation.

title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Vulcan (VMC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 5.93% and 1.54%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Construction Stock Q4 Earnings on Feb 16: OC, VMC, UFPI & More
text: The sector's Q4 results are likely to reflect solid housing demand. Yet, intense inflationary pressure owing to supply chain disruptions might have been a risk.

title: What to Expect From Vulcan Materials (VMC) This Earnings Season
text: Residential, non-residential and infrastructural activities are likely to have aided Vulcan Materials' (VMC) Q4 performance. Yet, higher costs may have been risks.
